jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at 99acres - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the 99acres family as a Backend Developer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!
